framework.name: 20% Close Rate Pricing Discovery
framework.description: Keep increasing prices until only ~20% of prospects say yes. This is the optimal price point — high enough to be profitable, low enough to maintain deal flow. Acts as market-based pricing calibration mechanism.
framework.raw_quote: my one recommendation is keep upping your price until you hit a point where only about 20% of people are saying yes to your projects and you should be making a really good amount of money at that point.

source.title: $50/Hour to $10K Agents: AI Voice Agency Pricing Masterclass
